cube_major_cycle_algorithm_envelope.description: CASA cube major-cycle envelope. For cube imaging this brackets CubeMajorCycleAlgorithm work including C++ tuneSelectData, nSubCubeFitInMemory, gridding/degridding, normalization, and subimage writeback that are not exposed as separate Python timers.
cube_major_cycle_algorithm_envelope.reason: no source timing fields found: make_psf, calcres_major_cycle, clean_major_cycle

deconvolution_minor_cycle.description: CASA minor-cycle, mask update, and convergence checks. For cube imaging minor_cycle brackets CubeMinorCycleAlgorithm.
deconvolution_minor_cycle.reason: no source timing fields found: minor_cycle, update_mask, has_converged

image_store_writeback_and_restore.description: CASA image-store writeback envelope: cube subimage writes occur inside major-cycle C++ calls, while final restored-image writes are included in restore_images.
image_store_writeback_and_restore.reason: no source timing fields found: clean_major_cycle, calcres_major_cycle, restore_images

major_cycle_residual.description: CASA residual major-cycle and clean major-cycle work.

setup_and_tool_construction.description: CASA PySynthesisImager setup, construction, initialization, and memory estimation.

coordinate_and_product_writeback.description: Output coordinate construction and image product writeback.

core_total.description: Total pure imaging-core wallclock from the Rust profiler.

fft.description: PSF, model, and residual FFT work.

frontend_ms_preparation.description: MS open, selection, row adaptation, and phase-center resolution.

frontend_total.description: Total frontend wallclock from the Rust profiler.

gridding_degridding.description: PSF gridding plus residual degrid/grid work.

model_prediction_and_residual_refresh.description: Major-cycle model prediction and residual refresh aggregate.

normalization_pb_correction.description: PSF and residual normalization; PB correction is included when the selected mode produces PB products.

preview_sidecar_generation.description: The benchmark script passes --no-preview-pngs, so preview sidecars are disabled.

visibility_adaptation_and_chunking.description: Visibility adaptation before entering the imaging core.

weighting_density_setup.description: Imaging weights, density grids, and taper setup.
